rationale: r0c2's SoC (0.45) remains above your minimum threshold (0.55) and cluster stress requires prioritizing self-preservation; defer non-urgent requests until your own SoC stabilizes above 0.40.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:

Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.55, distrusted_peers=[].
Your latest belief: Cluster-wide energy stress detected; r1c2 SoC declining despite inbound acceptances. Prioritize self-preservation while maintaining minimal geographic reciprocity. Escalate own requests to urgent to secure inbound supply before SoC falls below 0.40..
Reply with one of ACCEPT / REJECT / COUNTER on the first line, followed by `rationale: <one sentence>`.
